caption: A man with a beard, wearing a white t-shirt and over-ear headphones, is positioned in front of a professional microphone in a room with a dark, ribbed acoustic foam wall. His t-shirt features a black logo that reads "Stay Authentic". He has visible tattoos on his right arm. Across the sequence, the man is seen interacting with someone off-camera. He initially looks downward and then looks toward his left with a smile. He then looks back toward the center with a slight smirk, before finally closing his eyes and tilting his head slightly. Throughout the clip, he keeps his right hand raised to the top of his head, resting it near the headband of his headphones. The microphone remains stationary in the foreground, partially obscuring his lower face.
